title: 2XL Big Green Egg
description: The Biggest Green Egg of them all, the unrivaled 2XL EGG can easily handle your family reunion or cookouts with large groups – and is more than large enough to satisfy restaurant and catering needs. You’ll need to gather a crowd to tackle all of the ribs, steaks and burgers this EGG can handle … all at once! You can even roast a suckling pig … explore all the culinary possibilities with the new 2XL!
specs: Cooking Area: 672 sq in / 4336 sq cm

title: Large Big Green Egg
description: The Large EGG is the most popular size and a favorite to handle the cooking needs of most families and gatherings of friends. Accommodates all EGGcessories for baking, roasting or smoking. It’s versatile enough for weekend cookouts or pizza parties, large enough for eight steaks at once, and efficient enough for an impromptu meatloaf for two!
specs: Cooking Area: 262 sq in / 1688 sq cm

title: Medium Big Green Egg
description: Happiness in a smaller package! The Medium Big Green Egg is perfectly sized for smaller families and couples. It accommodates all the most popular EGGcessories like the convEGGtor and Pizza & Baking Stone. You can get all the famous Big Green Egg versatility and efficiency with plenty of cooking area to accommodate a cookout of four steaks or two whole chickens.
specs: Cooking Area: 177 sq in / 1140 sq cm
accessories: EGG Nest for a Medium or Small EGG

title: Mini Big Green Egg
description: A MINI Big Green Egg is the perfect solution for picnics and tailgating when you want to take The Ultimate Cooking Experience with you! It is also a popular size for grilling on apartment balconies or camping and boating. Leave those propane canisters at home and enjoy your favorite campfire meal on the MINI!
specs: Cooking Area: 79 sq in / 507 sq cm
accessories: Tool Set – Stainless Steel with Wood Handles, 3 Piece

title: MiniMax Big Green Egg
description: The MiniMax Big Green Egg is proof that great things come in small packages. This EGG is the first to arrive with its own transportation in the form of a sturdy, easy to grip Carrier! The MiniMax is perfect for camping, poolside and tailgating at the ballgame. MiniMax is built to perform and is ready to travel to wherever your culinary interests take you! Opening the MiniMax dome reveals a stainless steel cooking grid measuring 13 inches/33 cm in diameter for a whopping 133 square inches/855 cm2 of cooking area … all within a convenient 19.5 inch/50 cm height! And, of course, MiniMax is constructed from the same ultra high-quality ceramics as the other six EGG sizes, and comes with the same best-in-class limited lifetime warranty. The MiniMax Big Green Egg arrives in one complete package – including a sturdy, easy to grip Carrier.
specs: Cooking Area: 133 sq in / 856 sq cm

title: Small Big Green Egg
description: Big Flavor in a compact package! The Small Big Green Egg is an easy fit for smaller patios and balconies. It is able to prepare four burgers or chicken breasts at a time. The Small Big Green Egg is often used as a companion for the 2XLarge, XLarge, Large or Medium EGG to allow the preparation of several courses at once. It is perfect for restaurants seeking the performance of an EGG in a size to fit a commercial kitchen.
specs: Cooking Area: 133 sq in / 856 sq cm
accessories: EGG Nest for a Medium or Small EGG

title: TC30
description: INTIMATE LUXURY FOR THE SMALLEST SPACES Transform the ambiance of a small space without compromising on ambiance. Our TC30 fireplace is the first design-driven gas fireplace perfectly sized for smaller spaces and renovation projects, from bedrooms to bathrooms, with dramatic, full flames.

title: TC36 ARCH
description: TRADITIONAL DESIGN MEETS MODERN LIVING The TC36 Arch features a classic barrel arch face that replicates the Rumford-style hearth found in fine period homes. Without the clutter of louvers or heavy external trim, you can tailor the face with stone, tile or other finishes for a traditional look and feel – with all of the comforts of modern living.

title: TC36 SEE-THRU
description: DIVIDE SPACES WITH ARTISTIC STATEMENT Divide two rooms in dramatic fashion with the TC36 See-Thru fireplace. Delivering tall, bold flames to fill the generously proportioned firebox, the TC36 See-Thru delivers eye-catching beauty to two rooms at once.

title: TC36
description: A REFINED BALANCE Designed for medium-sized spaces, the TC36 recreates the authentic look of a full-flame, wood-burning hearth as a gas fireplace. It can be customized to your tastes – from traditional to contemporary, the choice is yours, including an arched variation that recreates the Rumford-style hearth found in fine period homes.

title: TC42
description: THE FIRST OF ITS KIND The fireplace that started it all, our TC42 is Town & Country’s flagship hearth, the first to Introduce the clean-face category, revolutionizing the industry. With dynamic, full flames, it commands presence in any room and can be customized to your tastes – from traditional to contemporary, the choice is yours.

title: TC54
description: A GRAND STATEMENT Our TC54 is the world’s largest factory-built, direct-vent gas fireplace, grandly proportioned to fit in great rooms and commercial settings that previously required a custom-built hearth. Tall, vibrant flames dance behind premium “disappearing” ceramic glass – a material so non-reflective, your guests will believe they’re looking at an open fire. When size matters, the luxurious TC54 delivers a massive performance.

title: WS38
description: MODERN, VERSATILE FIRE Our smaller widescreen, the WS38 fireplace sets an attractive scene – even when the bold, full flames aren’t burning. The streamlined silhouette offers a contemporary look with unmatched versatility for any space.

title: WS54 SEE-THRU
description: SOPHISTICATION IN SEPARATION A double-sided landscape of vibrant flames, our WS54 See-Thru fireplace is massive, sleek and ultra-modern. The ultimate statement piece, the WS54 See-Thru’s stunning flame is the focal point of two rooms at once, giving the look of luxury from every possible vantage point.

title: WS54
description: TAKING FIRE TO GREAT LENGTHS Our WS54 is a massive, widescreen landscape of deep, generous flames that captivate from any angle, making a statement in even the most spacious rooms. This ultra-modern fireplace is sleek and luxurious and can be customized for your space, from contemporary to traditional.

title: WS54ST INDOOR OUTDOOR
description: ULTIMATE PERFORMANCE, INSIDE AND OUT A striking architectural statement, our WS54 See-Thru Indoor-Outdoor fireplace takes outdoor living to a luxurious new level. The see-through face extends your living space, inviting the outdoors in and allowing for all-season enjoyment. The generous, full flames are protected by disappearing ceramic glass, unaffected by the elements.
